resources.string: Stay Connected with the lastest campus updates, events, and resources. Explore student services, upcoming workshops, and community highlights all in one place!
Graduation Gala- Dec 12 \n Celebrate the achievements of our graduating students with music and dinner
Cultural Dest - Jan 20 \n Experience global cultures through food, art, and performance
Career Fair - Feb 5 \n Meet recruiters from top companies and exploring internship opportunities
Intramural Finals - Mar 2 \n Support your favorite team in the annual campus sports championship
Campus Connect Support Center \n Thompson Rivers University \n 805 TRU Way, Kamloops, BC
